subject: math
activity_templates: A 4th-grade adding-fractions-with-like-denominators worksheet. 8 problems (e.g. '2/6 + 3/6 = __'). A 2x4 grid layout. Header reads 'Adding Fractions'. {{character}} gives a thumbs up.
A 4th-grade subtracting-fractions worksheet. 8 like-denominator subtraction problems (e.g. '5/8 - 3/8 = __') in a 2x4 grid. {{character}} holds a pencil.

A 4th-grade equivalent-fractions worksheet. 6 problems, each showing a fraction and asking the child to fill in the missing numerator or denominator to make it equivalent (e.g. '2/3 = __/6'). {{character}} points at the first.
A 4th-grade fractions-word-problem worksheet with 4 kid-friendly problems involving like-denominator addition and subtraction, each with workspace and answer box. {{character}} reads.
